description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features large windows, a driveway with a parked car, and a landscaped yard with a distinct tree and curved pathway. The front entrance is centrally located, flanked by two main rooms, and the rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a pool and patio area. The exterior walls are predominantly white with some stone and wood accents, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the backyard includes a small outbuilding or shed. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a driveway, pool, and patio. The exterior is white with stone and wood accents, enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, and a landscaped yard with a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a pool, patio, and a small outbuilding, as well as the flat roof and fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio area, and the arrangement of rooms opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the full length of the fence and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
